news.title: ON Semiconductor (ON) Is Buying Synaptics In A $7 Billion All Stock Deal
news.summary: ON Semiconductor (NasdaqGS:ON) has agreed to acquire Synaptics in an all stock deal valued at $7b. The transaction is aimed at expanding ON Semiconductor's reach into AI driven intelligent systems and edge AI applications. The deal is intended to add advanced AI processors and wireless connectivity alongside ON Semiconductor's existing power and analog portfolio. ON Semiconductor enters this deal

news.summary: If you are trying to work out whether ON Semiconductor is attractively priced or not, the recent share moves and current valuation metrics give you plenty to think about. The stock closed at US$90.65, with the share price down 25.5% over the last week and down 27.4% over the last month, although it is still up 59.9% year to date and up 71.3% over the past year. news.title: Why onsemi (ON) Shares Are Falling Today
news.summary: Shares of analog chips maker onsemi (NASDAQ:ON) fell 21.8% in the morning session after the company announced the acquisition of Synaptics in a $7 billion all-stock transaction, which raised investor concerns about shareholder dilution.
